speaker: narrator
text: This is the pulpit from which Sgt. Dooley delivers his words of wisdom and inspiration to his troops. Listen and take careful notes during each briefing.

speaker: narrator
text: The pigeonhole is a police officer's mailbox. He can receive love letters, subpoenas, nasty messages, and even departmental memos. You ought to check yours.

speaker: narrator
text: It's just an everyday, run-of-the-mill, rosewood, report-writing table with four legs, three drawers, and 243 pieces of gum stuck underneath.

speaker: narrator
text: There is a newspaper lying on the table.

speaker: narrator
text: You are looking at the latest in locker room benches. Don't slide after sitting or you'll spend the evening plucking wood chips out of your tail!

speaker: narrator
text: This shower is unique. It will give you all the hot water you want for two minutes, or all the ice water you want forever.

speaker: narrator
text: Aaah... there's nothing like a nice, hot shower!

speaker: narrator
text: You look at the ceiling and observe a lighting system that adequately illuminates the locker room. (Otherwise, it'd be dark in here!)

speaker: narrator
text: You look down and note a very clean, blue-tiled floor.

speaker: narrator
text: You are wearing blue polyester and gabardine trousers, a long-sleeve shirt, and shiny black shoes.

speaker: narrator
text: You see nothing special.

speaker: narrator
text: How can you do that?

speaker: narrator
text: Just do that yourself.

speaker: narrator
text: What would you do with it?

speaker: narrator
text: You shouldn't have done that!

speaker: narrator
text: My, what a filthy mind you have!

speaker: narrator
text: There's no one nearby.

speaker: narrator
text: You're not close enough.

speaker: narrator
text: You already have it.

speaker: narrator
text: You don't have it.

speaker: cop
text: "Hey! Somebody die in there?!"

speaker: cop
text: "Use the next stall! I'm giving birth to a sergeant in here!"

speaker: cop
text: "Hey, thanks a lot!"

speaker: helen
text: "Guys like you make me want a big dip of snuff! You never give a decent girl a break! You just hassle people!"

speaker: helen
text: "I'm truly sorry, sir. Is there anything I can do to convince you to let me off? And, I DO mean anything!"

speaker: helen
text: "Why, I've never heard of anyone by that name, Officer!"

speaker: helen
text: "Thanks for not giving me a ticket, Officer!"

speaker: helen
text: "What? And, as nice as I have been to you! Why, I gave you my phone number and everything. If you do anything to me, Turkey, I'll file rape charges on you so fast it'll make your head swim! Gawd, what a BUM!"

speaker: helen
text: "Well, how rude," she says, attempting to be offended. "But, if that's what it takes, I suppose it's all right with me!"

speaker: helen
text: "What did I do wrong, Officer?" she says, showing her best smile.
